creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Volodymyr,

unfortunately, there hasn't been any activity with your problem report on
multimedia/gnome-mplayer (see [1]) for a while. In the meantime, the port
has been updated multiple times, and building it worked fine with me. Does
the problem still exist with you, or should this PR be closed?

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/169807
